name: Habitat for Humanity Nantucket
tagline: Building Affordable Homes on Nantucket Since 2003
description: Habitat for Humanity Nantucket (HFHN) partners with families to build strength, stability, and self-reliance through affordable homeownership. With 12 homes completed on Wake Drive and more in the pipeline, HFHN is one of the island's most impactful housing organizations.
stephenNote: As President of HFHN, I see firsthand how homeownership transforms families and strengthens our community. Every home we build keeps another Nantucket family here year-round.

name: Congdon & Coleman Real Estate
description: Stephen Maury and the Congdon & Coleman team provide expert representation for buyers, sellers, and developers across the island.

name: Maury Development
tagline: Thoughtful, context-sensitive new homes and renovations
description: Creating homes that respect Nantucket's historic character while meeting modern needs.
